KisselKar Klub
News
Kissel Meet 2023 is planned for June 9-11, 2023, in Hartford, Wisconsin. Follow the link for more information. (2022-11-05)
You have found the internet home of the KisselKar Klub.
We are dedicated to the preservation of the vehicles and history of the Kissel Motor Car Company of Hartford, Wisconsin, USA.
If you have visited this site before, you may want to know What’s New.
If this is your first visit, you may wish to follow these links for…
Information About the KisselKar Klub and the Kissel Motor Car Company
A Gallery of selected Kissel vehicles
A brief history of the Kissel Motor Car Company
Kissel automobile offerings by year
Selected Articles about Kissel
